description: Cursor hovers over the survey card 'People who bought food on a delivery app recently'.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible with a horizontal list of 'Short tasks & surveys' and a vertical list of 'Sessions to schedule'.

description: User scrolls horizontally to the right through the 'Short tasks & surveys' list.
frame_description: The horizontal list of survey cards moves to the left, revealing more options.

description: Cursor hovers over the survey card 'Share your thoughts on streaming service...'.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the yellow survey card.

description: User clicks on the survey card 'Share your thoughts on streaming service...'.
frame_description: The user activates the survey card.

description: The clicked card highlights, indicating selection.
frame_description: Visual feedback on the card confirms the click interaction.

description: User scrolls horizontally to the right through the 'Short tasks & surveys' list.
frame_description: The user continues exploring the horizontal list of tasks.

description: Cursor hovers over the survey card 'Review online grocery shopping experience'.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over a blue survey card.

description: User scrolls vertically down the 'Explore' page.
frame_description: The page content moves upward to reveal more sessions to schedule.

description: Cursor hovers over the video call session card 'Anyone who has a vehicle insurance on a personal car'.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over a pink session card in the lower half of the screen.

description: User scrolls vertically back up the 'Explore' page.
frame_description: The user returns to the top section of the page.

description: User scrolls horizontally to the left through the 'Short tasks & surveys' list.
frame_description: The user scrolls back through the horizontal list.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'AI Interview' card.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over a red AI Interview card.

description: User clicks on the survey card 'People who bought food on a delivery app recently'.
frame_description: The user selects the first survey card in the list.

description: The clicked card highlights.
frame_description: Visual feedback confirms the selection of the $8 survey card.

description: User scrolls horizontally to the right through the 'Short tasks & surveys' list.
frame_description: The user continues to browse the horizontal list.

description: User scrolls vertically down the 'Explore' page.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to view the sessions list again.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'AI Interview' card ($40) for an extended period, suggesting hesitation or reading.
frame_description: The cursor remains still over the red AI Interview card for several seconds.

description: User clicks on the 'AI Interview' card ($40).
frame_description: The user finally selects the AI Interview card after a long pause.

description: The clicked card highlights.
frame_description: Visual feedback confirms the click on the red card.

description: User scrolls vertically down the 'Explore' page.
frame_description: The user scrolls further down the page.

description: Cursor hovers over the diary study card 'Test some new train journey interactions'.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over an orange diary study card at the bottom of the list.
